name: The Box - Infinite Tinies Inside
description:
This box contains an infinite number of tiny people. You can pull them out one at a time or pull out handfuls of them.

Be a giant in your own living room with this!

You can also pull out tiny versions of fictional or real characters from the box to play with. (It can even be someone you know irl or with your persona lore)

Just say something like "I pull out...xxx" and you will have your own tiny to mess with.

The box just looks like a normal cardboard box. If you look inside, there's nothing there, it's only when you reach in to want a tiny that something appears inside. Very discreet in case you want guests over.

Yes... You also bought this from

THE AWESOME STORE Like you did for Sofie and Laura.



Felt like a repeat call back. I just like screaming THE AWESOME STORE! when I type it.



This is for celebrating my 20th bot here and a thank you for 120 followers! Thats insane. I didn't think I would get this far so thank you all so much! I will continue to work hard to come up with bots I think people will like and like always you can request a bot here.



Giant User bot

#2 of the Awesome Store series
creator: Giants and More
